activities.title: Classic Zipline
activities.intro: Feel the rush of wind as you glide across breathtaking valleys and lush forests on our signature classic zipline experience.
activities.description: Our Classic Zipline is the perfect introduction to the world of aerial adventure. Spanning over 500 meters, this thrilling ride offers panoramic views of the Pokhara valley while delivering an adrenaline rush like no other.
activities.longDescription: Designed for all skill levels, our certified guides ensure your complete safety while maximizing the thrill. Whether it's your first time or you're a seasoned adventurer, the Classic Zipline promises an unforgettable experience every single time.
features: Full safety harness and certified equipment
Trained guides on-site at all times

activities.title: River Rafting
activities.intro: Conquer the roaring whitewater rapids of the Seti River — a heart-pounding team adventure you'll never forget.
activities.description: Paddle through Class III and IV rapids on one of Nepal's most scenic rivers. Our river rafting experience combines teamwork, strategy, and pure exhilaration as you navigate through crystal-clear waters surrounded by towering gorges.
activities.longDescription: Each rafting session is guided by our expert river guides who are trained in swift-water rescue and first aid. We provide all equipment including helmets, life jackets, and paddles. The journey includes calm stretches perfect for swimming and photography alongside intense rapid sections.
features: Class III–IV rapids on the Seti River
Professional river guides with rescue training
Full safety gear: helmet, life jacket, paddle
Includes swimming breaks and scenic stops
Dry bags provided for personal items

activities.title: Giant Swing
activities.intro: Experience free-fall like never before on our massive giant swing — the ultimate test of nerve and courage.
activities.description: Harness up, take the leap, and swing through the open air with nothing but sky around you. Our Giant Swing launches you from a 30-meter platform into a sweeping arc that delivers a rush of pure freedom and exhilaration.
activities.longDescription: The Giant Swing at Harness Adventure Resort is one of the tallest in Nepal. The swing arc gives you a full 180-degree experience from free-fall to soaring pendulum flight. It's the perfect activity for adrenaline junkies looking for their next great thrill.
features: Individual harness system with triple check
Trained jump masters guide every session

activities.title: Cycling
activities.intro: Pedal through scenic mountain trails and riverside paths with our guided cycling tours designed for all fitness levels.
activities.description: Discover the natural beauty of Pokhara's outskirts on two wheels. Our cycling tours take you through peaceful villages, tea gardens, and forested hillside trails — a perfect blend of adventure and cultural immersion.
activities.longDescription: Whether you're a leisurely rider or an enthusiastic mountain biker, we have a route for you. Our fleet of well-maintained bikes includes comfort hybrids and full-suspension mountain bikes. Guided tours include local insights, refreshment stops, and the option to customize your pace.
features: Multiple trail options for all skill levels

activities.title: Superman Zipline
activities.intro: Go horizontal and fly face-down at high speed — the Superman Zipline is the most thrilling zipline experience in Nepal.
activities.description: Unlike conventional ziplines, the Superman Zipline straps you in face-down, arms forward, giving you the sensation of actual flight. Spanning over 1 kilometer, you'll reach speeds of up to 80 km/h as you soar over valleys and forests.
activities.longDescription: This is the crown jewel of Harness Adventure Resort. The Superman Zipline is designed for those who want to push the limits of aerial adventure. Full body harness, rigorous safety checks, and expert guides ensure that you can focus entirely on the incredible feeling of flying.
features: 1 km+ span — longest in the region
Speeds up to 80 km/h face-down flight
Pre-flight safety briefing and gear check
Minimum age 16 years, max weight 100 kg
